name: nsolid-plugin
description: NodeSource AI skills for N|Solid performance and security

skills.name: ns-advanced-memory-leak-hunter
skills.description: Perform deep memory analysis to identify and locate memory leaks in production

skills.name: ns-analyze-asset
skills.description: Load and analyze N|Solid saved assets (CPU profiles, heap snapshots)

skills.name: ns-analyze-event
skills.description: Analyze event loop delays and identify blocking operations in production

skills.name: ns-analyze-tracing
skills.description: Collect and analyze distributed traces for request flow analysis

skills.name: ns-analyze-vulnerabilities
skills.description: Scan running production memory for actively-exploitable CVEs

skills.name: ns-audit-dependencies
skills.description: Audit project dependencies for known vulnerabilities and quality issues

skills.name: ns-benchmark-run
skills.description: Execute performance benchmarks against running production instances

skills.name: ns-cpu-spike-analysis
skills.description: Profile CPU usage of running production processes to identify bottlenecks

skills.name: ns-generate-asset
skills.description: Generate N|Solid diagnostics assets from production processes

skills.name: ns-generate-sbom
skills.description: Generate Software Bill of Materials for project dependency provenance

skills.name: ns-memory-spike-analysis
skills.description: Take and analyze heap snapshots of running production memory

skills.name: ns-node-upgrade
skills.description: Plan and execute Node.js version upgrades safely

skills.name: ns-optimize-function
skills.description: Optimize a selected Node.js function: assess impact, benchmark baseline, propose and validate an optimization

skills.name: ns-replace-package
skills.description: Identify and replace risky npm packages with safer alternatives

skills.name: ns-upgrade-package
skills.description: Safely upgrade npm packages with compatibility analysis

skills.name: ns-validate-optimization
skills.description: Validate benchmark results against established performance baselines
